violations.description: General employee practices. — --Food employee line cook observed without proper hair restraint. Beard restraints needed for line cooks.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Shelving for counter in wait staff area needs repaired or replaced.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Mount that holds order monitor in cooking area needs cleaned of debris.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not maintained in good repair. Corner tile that meets the floor in dishwashing area needs repaired or replaced.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
